features: Benefits of Aromatherapy: Each bath salts for women relaxing in the bath salt set is infused with a unique blend of essential oils; lavender to relax, eucalyptus to cleanse, chamomile to restore, and rose to moisturize. Incorporate aromatherapy into your daily life with our bath salts, ideal for relieving stress, easing muscle tension and promoting restful sleep.

Natural Essential Oil Formulas: Each organic epsom salt is carefully crafted with olea europaea fruit oil, hydrogenated jojoba oil, argan oil, and grapeseed oil to help nourish, moisturize, and soften the skin, leaving it with a healthy, youthful glow.

Enjoy Spa at Home: Take your bathing experience to new heights of relaxation and rejuvenation with our premium bath salts kit. Whether you're looking to unwind after a busy day or create a spa-like serenity at home, our bath salts for women offer the perfect relaxing experience.

Perfect Gift: Delight your loved ones with our beautifully packaged Bath Salt Set, a thoughtful and luxurious gift that delivers the spa experience directly to their home! Whether it's Christmas, a birthday, Valentine's Day, or any special occasion, this magnesium salts for bathing is the perfect gift for the woman who cares about self-care and relaxation.

Safe & Gentle for All Skin Types: Paraben free and residue free made with natural ingredients and elegantly blended with dried botanical flowers in a jar, this is the magnesium bath soak for your life. Safe and gentle on skin, suitable for all skin types.
